# Copilot Instructions

This is a FastAPI starter template for StackBlaze.

## When checking for updates
- Check FastAPI and Uvicorn for latest stable versions
- Ensure Python version in any config files is current (3.12+)
- Verify requirements.txt pins versions appropriately
- Check for deprecated FastAPI patterns (e.g., old dependency injection style)
- Keep the template minimal — this is a starter, not a production app
- Do not add unnecessary dependencies
